description: You have purchased more NVIDIA (NVDA) stock and need to consolidate your position in JStock to track a single 'Average Cost' line item. Your portfolio currently contains 25 shares of NVDA bought at $615.30, and you just bought 25 more shares on Feb 15, 2024, at $584.70 per share. Consolidate these into a single NVDA entry in 'My Portfolio' with 50 total units, the calculated weighted average price, the date Feb 15, 2024, and the comment 'Average Cost Merge'.
